title: Nested Object to Flat Table
scenario: Given a nested object representing a company's organizational chart, extract a flat table with employee IDs, names, and department names. The table should have the following columns: ID, Name, Department. The target output should be a Markdown table. Constraints: Must handle nested objects, must use a recursive function.

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the generated code adhere to the constraints?
Is the generated Markdown syntax valid?
Is the generated code efficient in terms of time complexity?
